notes: GOFFY starts as a non-privileged system app so ROM integration does not grant ambient OS authority.
The Gradle release APK is unsigned; sign it with a dedicated GOFFY release key before copying it as GoffyOS.apk into an AOSP build tree.
The Android app remains installable as a normal APK while ROM feasibility is proven.
A future privileged mode requires a new descriptor version, a privapp allowlist, and a separate security review.
